'''Guttu''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gangster who employed thief [[Cecil Noone]] and his associates around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He was double-crossed by Noone after the latter stole a [[Hapan]] [[Gun of Command]] prototype. Shortly afterward, Guttu put a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the thief's head.<ref name="Starfighter Trap" />
